actions.value:
You can link your bank or card during the process of creating your first Buy or Sell order in the app.

 

Once a card/bank is linked and your identity is fully verified with an exchanger, you'll be able to create seamless Buy & Sell transactions going forward 🎉

 

 

 

Note:

Your Edge account is only defined by a username and a password, it only holds crypto, and is client-side encrypted for your privacy. Any personal information submitted through the app, such as personal ID and payment information, is securely encrypted before being passed to any of the integrated exchange services you might work with while inside of Edge. We only work with long-standing and trustworthy companies, so your personal information will be safe and you have no risk of loss while buying or selling cryptocurrency within Edge*

 

*Just please be careful about sending crypto to someone potentially untrustworthy after an exchange completes your order. Crypto transactions are irreversible and there are a lot of con-artists selling lies to new users of crypto.

 

 

Let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.
